title: dynamics_and_universality_of_an_isothermal_combustion_probelm_in_2d
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 3]
Okay, here's the technical content extracted from the text:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   ||f|| = sup (x in R^2) |f(x)| (1 + |x|)^q, q > 2
*   phi(x) = 1/(4*pi*d) * exp(-|x|^2 / (4*d))
*   L\_A = -Delta - x/2 * nabla - 1 + A*phi\_d(x)
*   dq = e^(|x|^2 / 4) dx
*   A = integral over R^2 of (a1(x) + a2(x) ) dx > 0
*   q > q(A) = 2 + 2*lambda\_A
*   || t^(1+lambda\_A)*u1(sqrt(t)*x, t) - B*psi\_A(.) || -> 0
*   || tu2(sqrt(t)*x, t) - A*phi(.) || -> 0
*   || tu1(sqrt(t)*x, t) - (A1/(4*pi)) * e^(-|x|^2/4 ) || -> 0
*   || tu2(sqrt(t)*x, t) - (A2/(4*pi*d))* e^(-|x|^2/(4*d) ) || -> 0
*   A1 + A2 = A

title: dynamics_and_universality_of_an_isothermal_combustion_probelm_in_2d
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 4]
**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   `tu2(sqrt(tx), t) -> A phi(x) as t -> infinity.`
*   `w2(y, s) = tu2(sqrt(tx), t), s = log t and y = x/sqrt(t)`
*   `u_s = -(x/2) u`
*   `L = -d Delta -(x/2) * Nabla - 1`
*   `u1,t = Delta u1 - t^-1 A phi(x/sqrt(t)) u1`
*   `u1(y, s) = tu1(x, t), y = x/sqrt(t), s = log t`
*   `u1,s = -L_A u1`
*    `u1(y, s) e^(lambda_A s) -> B Psi_A(y), as s -> infinity`

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

**3. Tables:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

*   `delta > 0`
*   `B > 0`
*   `lambda_A`: first eigenvalue of L_A
*   `Psi_A`: eigenfunction of L_A
* `A`: total mass
* `t`: time
* `s`: log t
* `x`
* `y=x/sqrt(t)`

title: dynamics_and_universality_of_an_isothermal_combustion_probelm_in_2d
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 5]
Here's the breakdown of the technical content extracted from the image:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   Integral over R2 of (u1(x, t) + u2(x, t)) dx = Integral over R2 of (a1(x) + a2(x))dx, for all t greater than or equal to 0.
*   Integral over R2 of u1(x, t) dx less than or equal to Integral over R2 of a1(x) dx, Integral over R2 of u2(x, t) dx greater than or equal to Integral over R2 of a2(x) dx, for all t greater than or equal to 0.
*   Triple Integral from 0 to infinity over R2 of u1 u2^m (x, t) dxdt < + infinity.
*   0 less than or equal to u1(x, t) less than or equal to the infinity norm of a1, u1(x, t) less than or equal to  overline(u1)(x, t) and u2(x, t) greater than or equal to  overline(u2)(x, t), for all t greater than or equal to 0.
*   overline(u2)_t = d * Delta u2,  overline(u2)|_t=0 = a2(x)
*    overline(u1)_t = Delta u1 - overline(u1)*u2^m,  overline(u1)|_t=0 = a1(x)
*   ||u1(:, t)||_Lp + ||u2(:, t)||_Lp <= C(a1, a2, p) < infinity, 1 <= p < infinity

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**3. Tables:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**4. Diagrams:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

* m = 1 (case)
* 1 <= p <= infinity
* C(a1, a2, p) : a generic constant, depends on initial data and p is a positive integer
* d : from   overline(u2)_t = d * Delta u2

text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 6]
Okay, here's the technical content extracted from the image, formatted as requested:

1. **Mathematical Equations:**

*   Integral over R^2 of u2^p dx = Integral over R^2 of a2^p dx - d * Integral from 0 to t of Integral over R^2 of p(p-1)|nabla u2|^2 u2^(p-2) dx dtau + Integral from 0 to t of Integral over R^2 of p*u1*u2^(m+p-1) dx dtau (2.2)
*   d/dt * Integral over R^2 of (u1^2 + u1)u2^p dx dtau = Integral over R^2 of (1+2u1)(Delta u1 - u1u2^m)u2^p dx + Integral over R^2 of (u1^2 + u1)pu2^(p-1) (d(Delta u2)+ u1 u2^m) dx
*  = -2 Integral over R^2 of |nabla u1|^2 u2^p dx - Integral over R^2 of (1+2u1)pu2^(p-1) nabla u1 * nabla u2
*  - Integral over R^2 of (1+2u1)u1u2^(m+p) dx  - d Integral over R^2 of (1+2u1)pu2^(p-1) nabla u1 * nabla u2
*   - d Integral over R^2 of (u1^2 + u1)p(p-1)u2^(p-2) |nabla u2|^2 dx + Integral over R^2 of (u1^2+u1)pu2^(m+p-1) u1 dx
*   = I + II + III + IV + V + VI (2.3)
*   I + II + IV <= (1 + 2||a1||_infinito)(1+d) Integral over R^2 of (|nabla u1 * nabla u2|pu2^(p-1) - 2 Integral over R^2 |nabla u1|^2 u2^p dx)
*    <= Integral over R^2 of |nabla u1|^2 u2^p dx + C(||a1||_infinito, p) Integral over R^2 of |nabla u2|^2 pu2^(p-2) dx -2 Integral over R^2 |nabla u1|^2 u2^p dx
*   <= C(||a1||_infinito, p) Integral over R^2 of |nabla u2|^2 u2^(p-2) dx - Integral over R^2 of |nabla u1|^2 u2^p dx.
* III <= -Integral over R^2 of u1u2^(m+p) dx , V <= 0
*   VI <= (||a1||_infinito + ||a1||^2_infinito) Integral over R^2 of pu1u2^(m+p-1) dx

(2.7)

   ||u1||inf <= C(||a1||)(1+t)^(-1), for all t >= 0.  (3.1)
   u2(x,t) = integral over R^2 of H(y,t)a2(x-y)dy + integral from 0 to t of integral over R^2 of H(y,s)u1*u2^m(x-y,t-s)dyds 
   <= C(||a2||) / (1+t) + ( integral from 0 to 1 of integral over R^2 + integral from 1 to t of integral over R^2 ) of H(y,s)u1*u2^m(x-y,t-s)dyds
   H(x,t) = 1/(4*pi*dt) * e^(-x^2 / (4dt))
   integral from 0 to 1, integral over R^2, of H(y,s)u1*u2^m(x-y, t-s)dyds
   <= integral from 0 to 1 of ||u1||inf * ||u2||inf^m * chi(t-s) ds
   <= C(||a1||, ||a2||) * integral from 0 to 1 of 1/(1+t-s) ds
   <= C(||a1||, ||a2||) * (1/t)
   integral from 1 to t, integral over R^2, of H(y,s)u1*u2^m(x-y, t-s)dyds
   <= ( integral from 1 to t of s^(-1) * ||u1*u2^(m-1)||inf *(t-s) ds ) * integral over R^2 of u2 dy
   <= C(||a1||, ||a2||) * integral from 1 to t of s^(-1) * 1/(1+t-s) ds
   <= C(||a1||, ||a2||) * 2 * log t/(1+t).      (3.2)
   ||u2||inf <= C(||a1||, ||a2||) * log t / (1+t).

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   integral from 1 to t, integral over R^2 of H(y,s) u1 u2^m (x - y, t - s) dyds
*   is less than or equal to C(||a1||, ||a2||) integral from 1 to t of  s^-1 (log(1 + t - s))^(m-1) / (1 + t - s)^m ds
*   is less than or equal to C / (1 + t)

*   || tu1(sqrt(t)x, t) - A1 / (4 * pi) * e^(-|x|^2 / 4) || -> 0 as t -> infinity
*   || tu2(sqrt(t)x, t) - A2 / (4 * pi * d) * e^(-|x|^2 / (4d)) || -> 0 as t -> infinity
*   A1 + A2 = A
*   LA w = lambda_A w
*   r = |y|
*   w'(0) = 0
*   lambda_A is less than A / (4 * pi * d)

text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 13]
Here's a breakdown of the technical content found in the image:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   w(r) = ce^(-r^2/4) |r|^(2λ_A) + h.o.t
*   w'' + (r/2)w' + (w'/r) + w - Aφw = -λw
*   w'(0) = 0, w(r) > 0, ∀r ≥ 0
*   rw'(r) + (r^2/2)w = integral from 0 to r of v(Aφ - λ)w dv

*   w'(r_0) + r_0 w(r_0)/2 < 0 and Aφ(y) -λ < 0, ∀r ≥ r_0
*   g(r) = w'(r) + rw/2
*   e^(r^2/4)w(r) - e^(r_1^2/4)w(r_1) < -η integral from r_1 to r e^(v^2/4) v^(-1) dv
*   w(r) < -η/(2r^2), ∀r ≫ 1
*   z = e^(r^2/4) w
*   z'' - (r/2)z' + (1/r)z' = (Aφ - λ)z
*   z' > λz/r, ∀r ≫ 1

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

title: dynamics_and_universality_of_an_isothermal_combustion_probelm_in_2d
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 14]
**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   G(y) = rz'/2 - lambda z
*   G' = r/2 z'' + (1/2 - lambda) z' = (r/2 - 2*lambda/r)G - 2*lambda^2/r z + r/2 * A*phi*z
*   z > C/lambda e^(r^2/4)r^(-2*lambda) <=> w(r) > C/lambda r^(-2*lambda) , for all r >= 1
*   sigma(t) = z r^(-2*lambda), t = log r
*   sigma'' + (-e^(2t)/2 + 4*lambda)sigma' + 4*lambda^2 sigma = e^(2t) A*phi*sigma + e^(2t)/lambda sigma (4.3)
*   sigma''/sigma' > 0, (sigma' - delta sigma)' > 0 for all t >= 1
*   sigma''/sigma' > (1/2 - epsilon)e^(2t) for all epsilon > 0 if t >> 1
*   log sigma' > 1/2(1/2 - epsilon)e^(2t)
*   sigma' - mu sigma > 0, (sigma' - mu sigma)' > 0
*   4*lambda^2 * sigma > sigma' e^(2t)/4

text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 15]

 * tau = min_{|y|<=D} c0 phi(y)
 * tau <= (q-2)/4
 * I(w) = ws - Delta w - (y/2) * nabla w - w + c0 phi(y) w
 * w = {E1 exp(-|y|2/4) * e^(-c1*tau/2) + M*e^(-c1*tau/2), |y| <= D
        E1 exp(-|y|2/4) * e^(-c1*tau/2) + M*e^(-c1*tau/2) * D^q * |y|^(-q), |y| >= D
* c1 = delta * tau
* 4c1 < q - 2
* c1 * E1 < (M/4) * (q - 2 -2c1) * e^(D^2/4)
* I(w) >= e^(-c1*tau/2) * (1 - delta) * tau * (E1*e^(-|y|2/4) + M) > 0
*I(w) >= e^(-c1*tau/2)( (-c1/2)*E1*e^(-|y|2/4) +M/2 (q-2-c1)D^q |y|^(-q) - Mq(q+1) * |y|^(-q+2)*D^q) > 0
* lim (t-> infinity) | t u2(x,t) - A phi(x/sqrt(t)) | * t^(delta) -> 0
* lim (t-> infinity) integral_R  u2(x,t) dx - At^(delta) -> 0
* ||u1 + u2||_1=||a1 + a2||_1
* ||u1||_1 -> 0   as t-> infinity
